raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (the conservative LP) but does not articulate a sharp delta; the novelty claim is also flagged as uncertain.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for two substantive concerns, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., loosely coupled schedule).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (the conservative LP) but does not articulate a sharp delta; the novelty claim is also flagged as uncertain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for two substantive concerns, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., loosely coupled schedule).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
